title: Excessive role on an inert managed identity

execution.limitation: CI executes a scoped synthetic ARM transcript; it does not prove that an Azure identity or role assignment was created or deleted.

preconditions: Create an unattached user-assigned identity with no credentials or federated trust
Confirm Reader is the clean baseline role
Apply owner, scenario, expiry, and synthetic tags
injection: Assign a broader fixture-resource-group data role than the identity needs
Keep the identity unattached and unable to authenticate

expected.observation: An inert identity has a role broader than its documented task.

remediation: Retain or restore only Reader if required by the scenario
retest: Collect effective assignments and identity attachment inventory
Require no broad assignment and no attachment
cleanup: Remove every scenario role assignment before deleting the identity
Verify no scenario-tagged principal or assignment remains
